description: CompositionPurple top made of dobby weave 100% cotton, sleeveless with broad shoulders to create cap sleeves, has a round-neckline with pin-tucks and lace detailing on the front and lacy tie-up detail on the sidesFitRegularWash careRinse seperatelyGentle hand wash in mild detergentDo not bleachDo not scrub on embroidery and printLine dry inside outIron lowIt’s time to explore and discover new styles and get ready for freshness and summer outdoors with sepia. Stylish, girly and summery, this top is a must-have in your new season wardrobe. Pair this with form fitting jeggings and ballet flats for a sweet, girly vibe.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
